<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; use Predis\Command\Traits\Keys; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/fcall/ * * Invoke a function. */ class FCALL extends RedisCommand { use Keys; protected static $keysArgumentPositionOffset = 1; public function getId() { return 'FCALL'; } }
